subcodes.first_line: In these days the winds of tests are blowing with the utmost intensity, while certain souls, even as the manifest light, are rising and shining forth from the horizon of certitude with supreme steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اين ايّام ارياح امتحان در نهايت هيجانست ، نفوسی مانند نور مبين از افق يقين طالع و لائح و در نهايت ثبات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
